data.content: Plan reviewed and approved. The implementation plan for adding color and emoji to install/setup UX is complete, correct, and feasible. Key validation points: (1) All three target files (install.sh, agent-wizard.sh, setup.sh) have clean log-function extension points for styling. (2) The heredoc escaping risk in the launcher section of install.sh is real but properly identified — implementer must test generated launcher with bash -n after changes. (3) TTY/NO_COLOR/CI gating is the correct approach. (4) Bash 3.2 compatibility constraint is properly scoped. (5) Test strategy (bash -n + smoke tests + TTY vs pipe verification) covers the critical risks. No invariants to verify. Approved for implementation.
